transcription.text: I'm modern. And when my little Rodney has a cold, he gets a pill. It's modern. I'm modern, too. And when my little Betsy has a cold, I rub in Vicks VapoRub. So right. For continuous comfort to sleep all night through, Vicks VapoRub. Most comforting thing you can do for a cold. Even grown-up colds.
